_comment: A/B hero image specs for Teachable Machine for Micro:bit. 1500×1500 Etsy thumbnails. Features: load any Google Teachable Machine image model, run local TF.js inference, stream predictions to micro:bit V2 over BLE UART, 9 label→LED icon mappings.

heroes.name: hero-teacher
heroes.title:
Teach a Model.
Drive a micro:bit.
heroes.subtitle: Any Google Teachable Machine URL · local TF.js inference · 9 LED icon mappings

heroes.name: hero-kid
heroes.title:
Raise your hand.
LEDs light up.
heroes.subtitle: Train on Teachable Machine. Paste the URL. Show gestures. Watch your micro:bit respond.
heroes.footerLeft: No cloud after training · 100% local inference

heroes.name: hero-maker
heroes.title:
CMD:LABEL,CONFIDENCE
over Nordic UART.
heroes.subtitle: TensorFlow.js → BLE UART → LED arrows + hearts + smiles · open protocol
heroes.footerLeft: MakeCode firmware · any TM image model · Web Bluetooth

heroes.name: hero-laptop
heroes.title:
Real machine learning,
in a browser tab.
heroes.subtitle: 5-minute model training → 3-second deploy. Classroom ML demystified.
heroes.footerLeft: Runs on any Chromebook with a webcam

heroes.name: hero-fr-teacher
heroes.title:

Pilote un micro:bit.
heroes.subtitle: Toute URL Teachable Machine · inférence TF.js locale · 9 icônes LED
heroes.footerLeft: Mises à jour à vie · Licence école disponible

heroes.name: hero-fr-kid
heroes.title:

Les LEDs s'allument.
heroes.subtitle: Entraîne sur Teachable Machine. Colle l'URL. Fais des gestes. Regarde le micro:bit.
heroes.footerLeft: Pas de cloud après entraînement · 100 % local

sur UART Nordic.

heroes.footerLeft: Firmware MakeCode · tout modèle TM · Web Bluetooth

قُد micro:bit.
heroes.subtitle: أي رابط Teachable Machine · استدلال TF.js محلي · 9 أيقونات LED
heroes.footerLeft: تحديثات مدى الحياة · ترخيص مدرسي متاح

heroes.title:

تضيء الـ LEDs.
heroes.subtitle: درّب على Teachable Machine. الصق الرابط. افعل إيماءة. شاهد الـ micro:bit يستجيب.
